model_specification_line: smf.wls('empstat_ft ~ treat * post + C(statefip) + C(year)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: citizen == 3 (Not a citizen; proxy for undocumented status)
year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre and post periods; 2012 excluded as transition year)
yrimmig >= 1900 and yrimmig <= 2007 (valid immigration year; arrived by 2007 per DACA continuous-presence criterion)
yrimmig - birthyr_use < 16 (arrived before age 16, per DACA criterion)
birthyr_use in [1972, 1997] (age 15-40 as of June 2012, covering treatment and control cohorts)
